texto: As long as we practice with a vow to help others, we are the Bodhisattva of Great Compassion, and we become the leading figure in the Heart Sutra, whether we are a layperson or are ordained, whether whether celibate or married, living in the monastery or living in secular society.
explicacao: Citação de Dosung Yoo sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “As long as we practice with a vow to help others, we are the Bodhisattva of Great Compassion, and…” articula amor, bodhisattva-vows, buddhism em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como buddhism e heart-sutra.
